title: Hgw's spyglass-A
description: Backports the modern spyglass to 1.12.2 with animations, features and achievements!
body:
This mod backports the spyglass from modern versions to 1.12.2, including animations, features, and achievements. 
Current differences from the original: temporarily using the bow-pulling pose as a substitute, with minor animation modifications. 
Future plan: restore the poses from modern versions.
